description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced lot, featuring a combination of flat and low-pitched roofs. The structure is surrounded by a landscaped yard with several trees, a small pond, and a driveway leading to a covered garage. The main building is composed of two primary volumes: a larger, elongated section and a smaller, boxy section, both with large windows and clean, geometric lines. The property includes a paved walkway, a front entrance with a small porch, and a rear patio area. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, and metal, with some areas finished in light-colored siding. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped yard, trees, pond, and a covered garage, enclosed by a fence. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a mix of concrete, glass, and metal materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped yard with trees and a curved walkway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, pond, and the rear patio area, with more trees visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the full length of the bungalow, the rear patio, and the arrangement of trees and pond.
description_view_3: Back view showing the garage, rear patio, and the pond, with the fence enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and scattered side windows
